easy.title: Execution Timer Context
easy.description: Write `@contextmanager` printing elapsed time of block.
easy.solution:
import time
from contextlib import contextmanager
@contextmanager
def timer():
    t0 = time.time()
    try: yield
    finally: print(f'Elapsed: {time.time()-t0:.2f}s')
hints: yield in try, measure in finally

medium.title: Temporary Directory Changer
medium.description: Context manager `change_dir(path)` changing working dir during block and restoring original on exit.
medium.solution:
import os
from contextlib import contextmanager
@contextmanager
def change_dir(path):
    old = os.getcwd()
    os.chdir(path)
    try: yield
    finally: os.chdir(old)
hints: Save os.getcwd() and restore in finally

hard.title: Database Transaction Context
hard.description: Context manager committing transaction on success and rolling back on exception.
hints: Commit on success, rollback on exception

debugging.title: Fix Swallowed Exception
bugs: Returning True suppresses exceptions; return False instead.
